curation_notes: Patch commit 11107d6 identified from the advisory references. Only 1 source file changed (drivers/adodb-postgres64.inc.php). The fix adds pg_escape_identifier() to sanitize the $tablename and $fieldname parameters before interpolating them into a SQL SELECT query in the pg_insert_id() method. Sibling PostgreSQL drivers (postgres7, postgres8, postgres9) inherit from postgres64 via class extension and do not override pg_insert_id(), so no sibling locations added. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed from CWE-89 and the patch clearly adding SQL identifier escaping.
